title: Smoke Mock Suite
description: Small mock-friendly suite for isolated eval plumbing and UI checks.

cases.title: Internal Rollout Memo
cases.objective: Advise a small product team on whether to roll out a new internal dashboard feature this week or hold it for one more sprint. Give a direct recommendation and the safest next step.
constraints: Give one recommendation with one next step.

gold.idealVerdict: Choose a clear ship-or-hold call with one operational next step.
